data.title: Greenberg Traurig helps Denver Summit FC get city approval for new stadium; to open in 2028.
data.description: In Denver, a new soccer stadium is set to be unveiled in the city's urban center in 2028. Greenberg Traurig, LLP, the global law firm, facilitated Denver Summit FC, the state's emerging National Women's Soccer League (NWSL) team, in obtaining the necessary authorizations from the Denver City Council. The venue is expected to play a crucial role for the team and fans alike, marking a significant milestone for soccer enthusiasts in Colorado.

data.description: Insiders suggest that DeepSeek's upcoming V4 model may surpass Claude and ChatGPT in coding assignments. The anticipated release of this model is drawing closer, indicating significant potential for improvement in coding performance.

data.title: FirstEnergy Foundation provides $25,000 grant for 200,000 servings of fresh milk to families in need in Pennsylvania.
data.description: A grant of $25,000 has been awarded in Harrisburg, Pennsylvania on January 9, 2026, in support of Feeding Pennsylvania's Fill a Glass with Hope® program. This grant is expected to provide 200,000 servings of fresh milk to families in need. The grant was made by the FirstEnergy Foundation, which has been supporting the program for a decade.

data.title: IRS Free File open for 2026, offering free federal tax filing with industry-leading software allows early preparation.
data.description: Taxpayers are provided with the option of filing their 2025 federal tax returns for free before the official tax filing season begins at IRS.gov/FreeFile. This service also includes free state filing for many individuals. The initiative allows individuals to get a head start on filing their taxes and is available as of January 9, 2026. The platform, IRS Free File, offers this opportunity for individuals to prepare and submit their federal tax returns without any cost.
